cited as the CONTRAST: this card deliberately does NOT use the router's lazy-symbol shape - the leaf-module import is the opt-in, so the guard runs at import time (Decision 5's decision rule: a top-level module lazies; a dedicated opt-in leaf guards at import)

the toolbar-absent test discipline (groups: builtins.__import__ block scoped to absolute top-level debug_toolbar names only, sys.modules eviction/restore, two-sided parent-attribute restore, _HINT_SUBSTRING re-typed-literal drift-catch, pytest-xdist / --dist loadscope order-independence, D3 third-copy extraction call, Tests 9-12)

Decision 9: fakeshop's shipped settings deliberately carry no soft-dependency middleware, so tests/middleware/ with per-test settings overrides is the honest placement - real in-process fakeshop requests, package-test home; fail_under = 100 gate; promotion rule applies if fakeshop ever opts in (TODO-BETA-053)

Decision 9 / Risks: the toolbar-present fixture's setup-time schema_reload.reload_all_project_schemas() call, first, before the URLconf steps - the acceptance suites' order-independence-by-reconstruction answer to package-test registry.clear() (groups: LazyType KeyError, DuplicatedTypeName, config.schema aggregate build, --dist loadscope shared-worker flake, single-sited examples/fakeshop/schema_reload.py)

the repo's seed-helper rule: every product-query test's first executable line is seed_data(1) (or an explicit seed_data(N)) from apps.products.services - the panel payload does not depend on row counts, but the query must hit real rows to emit SQL (Tests 3 and 6)

why the SQL panel matters for this package: the panel is how a developer sees the optimizer's plan (select_related / prefetch_related / only() / FK-id elision) as executed queries during a /graphql/ request; Tests 3+ emit real SQL through the real optimizer

what makes the in-package template resolvable: consumers already list django_strawberry_framework in INSTALLED_APPS, so the app-dirs loader finds templates/django_strawberry_framework/debug_toolbar.html (Decision 4; TemplateDoesNotExist edge case)
explicitly NOT used by this card: the failure mode is a missing optional dependency at import time (ImportError with install hint), not configuration validation

Helper-reuse D-N2 non-reuse: the middleware is a Django HTTP middleware on the raw request/response pair, not a resolver-context surface - the helper's single-siting rule does not apply here
edge case: a multipart upload request's consumed body degrades the operationName sniff to None (inject normally) - degradation identical to upstream, not breakage
